title: Core Agent Model
description: Agent definition, output schema, tool state, lifecycle hooks, and public agent interface

classes.name: AgentBase
classes.notes: Base shared by Agent and RealtimeAgent

classes.name: Agent
attributes: instructions: str | Callable[[RunContextWrapper, Agent], MaybeAwaitable[str]] | None = None
methods: clone(**kwargs) -> Agent[TContext]  — shallow copy via dataclasses.replace
as_tool(tool_name, tool_description, custom_output_extractor, is_enabled, on_stream, run_config, max_turns, hooks, ...) -> FunctionTool  — wraps agent as callable tool
classes.notes: Core AI agent. Generic on TContext (dependency-injection object). as_tool() enables manager/orchestrator patterns.

classes.name: AgentOutputSchema
attributes: _is_wrapped: bool  [private]  — True when type cannot be a JSON Schema object directly
methods: validate_json(json_str: str) -> Any  — unwraps wrapper dict if _is_wrapped
classes.notes: Wraps non-BaseModel/dict types in a TypedDict with key 'response' for JSON Schema compatibility

classes.name: ToolsToFinalOutputResult
classes.notes: Returned by ToolsToFinalOutputFunction to decide if tool results end the run

classes.name: AgentToolStreamEvent
classes.notes: Streaming event emitted when an agent is invoked as a tool

classes.name: RunHooksBase
methods: on_llm_start(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: Agent, system_prompt: str | None, input_items: list) -> None  [async]
on_llm_end(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: Agent, response: ModelResponse) -> None  [async]
on_agent_end(context: AgentHookContext, agent: TAgent, output: Any) -> None  [async]
on_handoff(context: RunContextWrapper, from_agent: TAgent, to_agent: TAgent) -> None  [async]
on_tool_start(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: TAgent, tool: Tool) -> None  [async]
on_tool_end(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: TAgent, tool: Tool, result: str) -> None  [async]
classes.notes: Observes entire Runner.run() invocation including handoffs. RunHooks = RunHooksBase[TContext, Agent]

classes.name: AgentHooksBase
methods: on_end(context: AgentHookContext, agent: TAgent, output: Any) -> None  [async]
on_handoff(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: TAgent, source: TAgent) -> None  [async]
on_tool_start(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: TAgent, tool: Tool) -> None  [async]
on_tool_end(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: TAgent, tool: Tool, result: str) -> None  [async]
on_llm_start(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: Agent, system_prompt: str | None, input_items: list) -> None  [async]
on_llm_end(context: RunContextWrapper, agent: Agent, response: ModelResponse) -> None  [async]
classes.notes: Attached to a specific Agent instance via agent.hooks. AgentHooks = AgentHooksBase[TContext, Agent]

classes.name: AgentToolStateModule
attributes: _agent_tool_run_results_by_obj: dict[int, RunResult | RunResultStreaming]  — keyed by id(tool_call)
_agent_tool_run_results_by_signature: dict[ScopedToolCallSignature, set[int]]  — fallback by stable signature
methods: set_agent_tool_state_scope(context: Any, scope_id: str | None) -> None
classes.notes: Ephemeral per-run cache: links nested agent RunResults to their originating tool calls for human-in-the-loop resume. Weakref cleanup prevents memory leaks.

classes.name: PublicAgentModule
methods: set_public_agent(execution_agent: Agent, public_agent: Agent) -> Agent  — tags execution clone with user-visible identity
get_public_agent(agent: Agent) -> Agent  — returns user-visible agent identity for hooks/results
classes.notes: Preserves user-visible agent identity when Runner creates internal execution clones

type_aliases: ToolCallSignature = tuple[str, str, str, str, str | None, str | None]
key_relationships: Agent composes AgentHooksBase via hooks field (0..1)
Agent composes ModelSettings via model_settings field
Agent composes list[Tool] via tools field
Agent composes list[Handoff | Agent] via handoffs field
Agent composes AgentOutputSchemaBase via output_type field (0..1)
Agent composes MCPConfig (TypedDict) via mcp_config field
AgentToolStateModule tracks RunResult keyed by ResponseFunctionToolCall (association)
PublicAgentModule wraps Agent via attribute tagging (utility dependency)
RunHooksBase depends_on Agent, AgentHookContext, RunContextWrapper, Tool, ModelResponse
AgentHooksBase depends_on Agent, AgentHookContext, RunContextWrapper, Tool, ModelResponse
important_notes: Agent is Generic[TContext]: context is a user-supplied DI object passed to tools/hooks/guardrails
instructions can be a static string or async callable(context, agent) -> str for dynamic prompts
tool_use_behavior has 4 modes: 'run_llm_again' (default), 'stop_on_first_tool', StopAtTools dict, or custom ToolsToFinalOutputFunction
reset_tool_choice=True (default) prevents infinite LLM tool-call loops
as_tool() wraps an Agent as a FunctionTool — 'manager' pattern vs 'handoff' pattern (handoff passes full conversation history, as_tool uses generated input)
AgentToolState uses weakref on ResponseFunctionToolCall for GC-triggered cleanup of nested run results
PublicAgentModule: Runner may clone agents for execution; _public_agent attribute preserves original identity for hooks/results
AgentOutputSchema wraps non-BaseModel/dict types in a TypedDict with key 'response' to satisfy JSON Schema object requirement
Two hook scopes: RunHooksBase (whole Runner.run invocation) vs AgentHooksBase (specific agent instance via agent.hooks)
Hook context varies: agent start/end use AgentHookContext; LLM/tool/handoff hooks use RunContextWrapper (or ToolContext for function tools)
